data.content: Invariant model and persistence wiring is fully implemented on main. Domain model (InvariantType Scope/State + condition), DB migration v7 with invariants_json column, KnotInvariantsSet event kind, CLI flags (--add-invariant/--remove-invariant/--clear-invariants), sync/apply/snapshot support, UI/prompt rendering, and comprehensive tests all in place. make sanity passes with 378 tests and coverage threshold met.
